pi_items.source: Task description strictly requires saving the output to this exact path.
Task description strictly requires generating exactly 40 random points.
Extracted exact bounding box for Madagascar from the provided ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp Natural Earth dataset.
Task description explicitly asks to add fields named 'LON' and 'LAT'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world GIS data from the Natural Earth 110m Admin 0 Countries dataset, specifically focusing on Madagascar. The requested output is exactly 40 points saved to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/madagascar_survey.shp with 'LON' and 'LAT' fields. While the metadata provides an approximate bounding box for Madagascar, the exact bounds extracted from the shapefile are [min_x: 43.254, max_x: 50.477, min_y: -25.601, max_y: -12.041].
